---
description: "Refactor existing code in the oddjobs.design typography tool"
agent: "agent"
argument-hint: "Describe what you want to refactor..."
---
Refactor the following in the oddjobs.design typography animation tool:

$input

## Steps

1. Read the relevant source files to understand the current implementation
2. Identify what to improve — structure, readability, performance, or maintainability
3. Refactor while preserving all existing behavior (no functional changes unless requested)
4. Verify there are no errors in the changed files
5. Append a new session entry to `PROMPT-HISTORY.md` using the template at the top of that file
